name: Apple Crisp Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the salad oil and sugar until well combined.
2. Add the eggs and vanilla extract to the mixture. Stir gently to incorporate.
3. Gradually add the flour, baking soda, and cinnamon, stirring continuously.
4. Fold in the chopped apples and nuts (if using).
5. Pour the batter into a 9 x 13 inch pan.
6. Bake for 50-60 minutes until set and golden brown on top.
7. Allow the brownies to cool completely before cutting into bars.
8. Store leftovers in an airtight container; they will stay fresh for weeks.
